Name: EVENT_PARAM
Description: Defines configuration settings for a gameplay or map event, including ownership, startup behavior, state handling, and execution conditions.

Fields.Name: State Map ID
Fields.Description: Identifier of the state map associated with this event. Used to determine event state transitions or conditions.

Fields.Name: Owner Entity ID
Fields.Description: Identifier of the owner entity or object associated with this event.

Fields.Name: Bonfire ID
Fields.Description: References the bonfire tied to this event, if applicable.

Fields.Name: Resource Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the type of resource or asset used by the event.

Fields.Name: Boot Type
Fields.Description: Determines how or when the event is initialized or started.

Fields.Name: Owner Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the category or classification of the event owner.

Fields.Name: Group Condition Sync
Fields.Description: Controls whether event group conditions are synchronized across related events.

Fields.Name: Run While Player Is Dead
Fields.Description: If enabled, the event continues to execute even while the player character is dead.

Fields.Name: Run During Cutscenes
Fields.Description: If enabled, the event remains active during cutscenes or demo playback.
